name: Chicken in Lemon Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound chicken breasts with a meat mallet.
2. Coat the chicken in flour; season with salt and pepper.
3. Melt margarine in a large skillet.
4. Add chicken and garlic to the skillet.
5. Cook over medium heat until the chicken is tender on all sides.
6. Remove the chicken to a serving platter and keep warm.
7. Add lemon juice to the skillet, scraping drippings from the bottom of the pan.
8. Bring to boil for 1 minute or until slightly thickened.
9. Stir in parsley.
10. Pour sauce over the chicken.
11. Garnish with lemon slices.
